rationale: Art. VIII §15 governs tax liens and seizure/sale of delinquent taxpayers' property. It does not address homestead exemption amounts or limits, so increasing the §11.13(b) exemption does not conflict.
quote: The annual assessment made upon landed property shall be a special lien thereon; and all property, both real and personal, belonging to any delinquent tax payer shall be liable to seizure and sale for the payment of all the taxes and penalties due by such delinquent
_note: No conflict; this constitutional provision addresses tax collection enforcement, not exemption levels.
